testcase.name: TestOutage/log-agent
testcase.failure:
=== RUN TestOutage/log-agent suite.go:313: Label filter expression: "outage and log-agent", test labels: [selfmonitor log-agent outage set-a] 2026/04/07 00:36:12 evaluating test labels: [selfmonitor log-agent outage set-a] suite.go:318: FIPS configuration: imagesAvailable=true, fipsMode=true (source: environment default) reconfigure.go:20: Setting up cluster: istio=false, fips=true, experimental=false, prerequisites=true, forceFresh=false, helmValues=[], chart= reconfigure.go:135: Detected Istio state: not installed reconfigure.go:81: Helm values changed. Current release values:
New values: default: enabled: true experimental: enabled: false manager: container: env: appLogLevel: debug operateInFipsMode: true image: pullPolicy: Always repository: europe-docker.pkg.dev/kyma-project/prod/telemetry-manager:v20260402-15523d4a nameOverride: telemetry manager.go:235: Deploying telemetry manager from: /home/runner/work/telemetry-manager/telemetry-manager/helm manager.go:200: Running: helm [upgrade --install telemetry /home/runner/work/telemetry-manager/telemetry-manager/helm --namespace kyma-system --set experimental.enabled=false --set default.enabled=true --set nameOverride=telemetry --set manager.container.env.operateInFipsMode=true --set manager.container.env.appLogLevel=debug --wait --timeout 5m --set manager.container.image.repository=europe-docker.pkg.dev/kyma-project/prod/telemetry-manager:v20260402-15523d4a --set manager.container.image.pullPolicy=Always] manager.go:241:
